prompt: Tight medium shot on an exhausted Chinese male office worker, late 30s, sitting at his desk in a near-empty dark office. Strong vignette toward the corners; leave the upper-center area dimmer for a title overlay in post. Mood: totally drained, no tears, just numb survival.
